diff: This document contains a Directory of all prospective Instances of the Integration Boost Primitive whose Invocation is currently in progress. Invocations that are completed successfully are moved to [A.6.1.1.8.2.5.2.1.2 - Active Instances Directory](b25b5713-b5db-4666-af29-f569289df9d4), whereas failed Invocations are Archived in [A.6.1.1.8.2.5.2.1.5 - Hub Data Repository](2fa2c7c2-6bfb-4620-bfa4-45c9d7cff7c6).

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
